name: io.github.hugegreencandle/xahau-mcp
description: MCP server for the Xahau network — runs Hook WASM bytecode in a local VM and a Hooks-specific static-analysis/security rule engine, both offline, plus read-only ledger, codec, governance and unsigned-tx tooling. Read-only, no key custody.
title: Xahau MCP

environmentVariables.name: XAHAU_RPC_URLS
environmentVariables.description: Optional comma-separated override of Xahau JSON-RPC endpoints (defaults to built-in mainnet/testnet endpoints)
